description: Style Note Work the warm weather aesthetic with wrangler's new collection of old, classic favourites. Tailored with a Fit to look slim and in-vogue, style this tee with an understated denim shirt and a cargo style jacket and slip into your favourite denims! Product Details Black and grey polo t-shirt, has a spread collar, half buttoned placket, short sleeves and appliqué on the left chest Material and Care 100% cotton, Machine wash with like colours using a mild detergent Wash and dry inside out Do not bleach or wring Flat dry in shade or tumble dry Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations Size and Fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
